mapper.select:
SELECT p.proc_code, p.proc_name, p.note, f.fac_class_code, p.proc_class_code, e.ent_member_code
FROM proc p JOIN ent_member e ON p.ent_member_code = e.ent_member_code JOIN fac f ON p.fac_class_code = f.fac_class_code

SELECT DISTINCT p.proc_code, p.proc_name, p.note, f.fac_class_code, p.proc_class_code
FROM proc p JOIN fac f ON p.fac_class_code = f.fac_class_code
AND fac_class_code LIKE '%' || #{managerVO.keyword} || '%'
AND proc_class_code LIKE '%' || #{managerVO.keyword} || '%'
AND UPPER(proc_name) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{managerVO.keyword}) || '%'
